queries.name: marketplaceCategories
queries.description: Get alphabetically sorted list of Marketplace categories.

args.name: excludeSubcategories
args.description: Returns top level categories only, excluding any subcategories.

queries.name: marketplaceCategory
queries.description: Look up a Marketplace category by its slug.

args.name: useTopicAliases
args.description: Also check topic aliases for the category slug.

args.name: slug
args.description: Select the listing that matches this slug. It's the short name of the listing used in its URL.

args.name: adminId
args.description: Select listings that can be administered by the specified user.

args.name: after
args.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

args.name: allStates
args.description: Select listings visible to the viewer even if they are not approved. If omitted or false, only approved listings will be returned.

args.name: before
args.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

args.name: categorySlug
args.description: Select only listings with the given category.

args.name: first
args.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

args.name: last
args.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

args.name: organizationId
args.description: Select listings for products owned by the specified organization.

args.name: primaryCategoryOnly
args.description: Select only listings where the primary category matches the given category slug.

args.name: slugs
args.description: Select the listings with these slugs, if they are visible to the viewer.

args.name: useTopicAliases
args.description: Also check topic aliases for the category slug.

args.name: viewerCanAdmin
args.description: Select listings to which user has admin access. If omitted, listings visible to the viewer are returned.

args.name: withFreeTrialsOnly
args.description: Select only listings that offer a free trial.

fields.name: clientId
fields.description: The client ID of the app.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The description of the app.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the App object.

fields.name: ipAllowListEntries
fields.description: The IP addresses of the app.

arguments.name: after
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come after the specified cursor.

arguments.name: before
arguments.description: Returns the elements in the list that come before the specified cursor.

arguments.name: first
arguments.description: Returns the first n elements from the list.

arguments.name: last
arguments.description: Returns the last n elements from the list.

arguments.name: orderBy
arguments.description: Ordering options for IP allow list entries returned.

fields.name: logoBackgroundColor
fields.description: The hex color code, without the leading '#', for the logo background.

fields.name: logoUrl
fields.description: A URL pointing to the app's logo.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the app.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: A slug based on the name of the app for use in URLs.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL to the app's homepage.

objects.name: Bot
objects.description: A special type of user which takes actions on behalf of GitHub Apps.

fields.name: avatarUrl
fields.description: A URL pointing to the GitHub App's public avatar.

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: The size of the resulting square image.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was created.

fields.name: databaseId
fields.description: Identifies the primary key from the database.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the Bot object.

fields.name: login
fields.description: The username of the actor.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this bot.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Identifies the date and time when the object was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this bot.

objects.name: MarketplaceCategory
objects.description: A public description of a Marketplace category.

fields.name: description
fields.description: The category's description.

fields.name: howItWorks
fields.description: The technical description of how apps listed in this category work with GitHub.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the MarketplaceCategory object.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The category's name.

fields.name: primaryListingCount
fields.description: How many Marketplace listings have this as their primary category.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for this Marketplace category.

fields.name: secondaryListingCount
fields.description: How many Marketplace listings have this as their secondary category.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: The short name of the category used in its URL.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for this Marketplace category.

objects.name: MarketplaceListing
objects.description: A listing in the GitHub integration marketplace.

fields.name: app
fields.description: The GitHub App this listing represents.

fields.name: companyUrl
fields.description: URL to the listing owner's company site.

fields.name: configurationResourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for configuring access to the listing's integration or OAuth app.

fields.name: configurationUrl
fields.description: The HTTP URL for configuring access to the listing's integration or OAuth app.

fields.name: documentationUrl
fields.description: URL to the listing's documentation.

fields.name: extendedDescription
fields.description: The listing's detailed description.

fields.name: extendedDescriptionHTML
fields.description: The listing's detailed description rendered to HTML.

fields.name: fullDescription
fields.description: The listing's introductory description.

fields.name: fullDescriptionHTML
fields.description: The listing's introductory description rendered to HTML.

fields.name: hasPublishedFreeTrialPlans
fields.description: Does this listing have any plans with a free trial?.

fields.name: hasTermsOfService
fields.description: Does this listing have a terms of service link?.

fields.name: hasVerifiedOwner
fields.description: Whether the creator of the app is a verified org.

fields.name: howItWorks
fields.description: A technical description of how this app works with GitHub.

fields.name: howItWorksHTML
fields.description: The listing's technical description rendered to HTML.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Node ID of the MarketplaceListing object.

fields.name: installationUrl
fields.description: URL to install the product to the viewer's account or organization.

fields.name: installedForViewer
fields.description: Whether this listing's app has been installed for the current viewer.

fields.name: isArchived
fields.description: Whether this listing has been removed from the Marketplace.

fields.name: isDraft
fields.description: Whether this listing is still an editable draft that has not been submitted for review and is not publicly visible in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isPaid
fields.description: Whether the product this listing represents is available as part of a paid plan.

fields.name: isPublic
fields.description: Whether this listing has been approved for display in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isRejected
fields.description: Whether this listing has been rejected by GitHub for display in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isUnverified
fields.description: Whether this listing has been approved for unverified display in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isUnverifiedPending
fields.description: Whether this draft listing has been submitted for review for approval to be unverified in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isVerificationPendingFromDraft
fields.description: Whether this draft listing has been submitted for review from GitHub for approval to be verified in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isVerificationPendingFromUnverified
fields.description: Whether this unverified listing has been submitted for review from GitHub for approval to be verified in the Marketplace.

fields.name: isVerified
fields.description: Whether this listing has been approved for verified display in the Marketplace.

fields.name: logoBackgroundColor
fields.description: The hex color code, without the leading '#', for the logo background.

fields.name: logoUrl
fields.description: URL for the listing's logo image.

arguments.name: size
arguments.description: The size in pixels of the resulting square image.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The listing's full name.

fields.name: normalizedShortDescription
fields.description: The listing's very short description without a trailing period or ampersands.

fields.name: pricingUrl
fields.description: URL to the listing's detailed pricing.

fields.name: primaryCategory
fields.description: The category that best describes the listing.

fields.name: privacyPolicyUrl
fields.description: URL to the listing's privacy policy, may return an empty string for listings that do not require a privacy policy URL.

fields.name: resourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for the Marketplace listing.

fields.name: screenshotUrls
fields.description: The URLs for the listing's screenshots.

fields.name: secondaryCategory
fields.description: An alternate category that describes the listing.

fields.name: shortDescription
fields.description: The listing's very short description.

fields.name: slug
fields.description: The short name of the listing used in its URL.

fields.name: statusUrl
fields.description: URL to the listing's status page.

fields.name: supportEmail
fields.description: An email address for support for this listing's app.

fields.name: supportUrl
fields.description: Either a URL or an email address for support for this listing's app, may return an empty string for listings that do not require a support URL.

fields.name: termsOfServiceUrl
fields.description: URL to the listing's terms of service.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The HTTP URL for the Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanAddPlans
fields.description: Can the current viewer add plans for this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanApprove
fields.description: Can the current viewer approve this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanDelist
fields.description: Can the current viewer delist this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanEdit
fields.description: Can the current viewer edit this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanEditCategories
fields.description: Can the current viewer edit the primary and secondary category of this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanEditPlans
fields.description: Can the current viewer edit the plans for this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerCanRedraft
fields.description: Can the current viewer return this Marketplace listing to draft state so it becomes editable again.

fields.name: viewerCanReject
fields.description: Can the current viewer reject this Marketplace listing by returning it to an editable draft state or rejecting it entirely.

fields.name: viewerCanRequestApproval
fields.description: Can the current viewer request this listing be reviewed for display in the Marketplace as verified.

fields.name: viewerHasPurchased
fields.description: Indicates whether the current user has an active subscription to this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: viewerHasPurchasedForAllOrganizations
fields.description: Indicates if the current user has purchased a subscription to this Marketplace listing for all of the organizations the user owns.

fields.name: viewerIsListingAdmin
fields.description: Does the current viewer role allow them to administer this Marketplace listing.

fields.name: edges
fields.description: A list of edges.

fields.name: nodes
fields.description: A list of nodes.

fields.name: pageInfo
fields.description: Information to aid in pagination.

fields.name: totalCount
fields.description: Identifies the total count of items in the connection.

fields.name: cursor
fields.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

fields.name: node
fields.description: The item at the end of the edge.

interfaces.name: OauthApplicationAuditEntryData
interfaces.description: Metadata for an audit entry with action oauth_application.*.

fields.name: oauthApplicationName
fields.description: The name of the OAuth application.

fields.name: oauthApplicationResourcePath
fields.description: The HTTP path for the OAuth application.

fields.name: oauthApplicationUrl
fields.description: The HTTP URL for the OAuth application.

enums.name: OauthApplicationCreateAuditEntryState
enums.description: The state of an OAuth application when it was created.

values.name: ACTIVE
values.description: The OAuth application was active and allowed to have OAuth Accesses.

values.name: PENDING_DELETION
values.description: The OAuth application was in the process of being deleted.

values.name: SUSPENDED
values.description: The OAuth application was suspended from generating OAuth Accesses due to abuse or security concerns.
